compiled_state.title: Write RED tests for resolve_scalar_trailers
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description: Extend tests/unit/scripts/test-apply-attribution-trailers.sh with: test_resolve_scalar_trailers_produces_task_story_epic_flags() (prepend mock bin/ to PATH containing dso script that outputs fixture ticket JSON; ARTIFACTS_DIR=tmpdir; output includes DSO-Task/Story/Epic flags), test_resolve_scalar_trailers_produces_review_score_flag() (fixture reviewer-findings.json with score field -> DSO-Review-Score flag), test_resolve_scalar_trailers_produces_no_flags_when_no_context() (no task-id, no findings -> empty output). Isolation: tests use PATH-prepend for dso mock, tmpdir for ARTIFACTS_DIR. Tests fail (RED). TDD exemption: test-writing task.
